effect.lne_wizards.arcane_precision.desc: Makes targets more vulnerable to Arcane Spell Damage
effect.lne_wizards.flame_rush.descriptio: Increases movement speed and fire spell power.
effect.lne_wizards.obsidian_shards.descr: Spawns sharp obsidian shards around the caster, damaging nearby close targets and increasing armor.
effect.lne_wizards.zephyrs_speed.descrip: Increasing the Crit Chance & Movement Speed of the caster.
passive.lne_wizards.dragon_staff_1: With each damaging spell, you get stronger on the actual target.
passive.lne_wizards.dragon_staff_2: Increasing the Crit Chance & Crit Damage of Arcane Spell Damage.
passive.lne_wizards.everfrost_staff_1: Applies the Freezing effect and stacks freezing ticks after dealing damage.
passive.lne_wizards.everfrost_staff_2: Also applies these effects to close targets.
passive.lne_wizards.netherflame_staff_1: You gain Spell Haste when attacking burning foes.
passive.lne_wizards.netherflame_staff_2: Also applies fire ticks to close targets.
passive.lne_wizards.seismic_staff_1: Spawns sharp obsidian shards around the caster, damaging close targets.
passive.lne_wizards.seismic_staff_2: Slightly Increases Armor of the caster.
passive.lne_wizards.tidecaller_staff_1: Heals nearby allies, while casting spells on targets.
passive.lne_wizards.tidecaller_staff_2: If the caster drops under 20% health, the caster gains water spell power on damaging.
passive.lne_wizards.zephyrwing_staff_1: Your chance to critically strike is increased while casting spells.
passive.lne_wizards.zephyrwing_staff_2: Also your movement speed is increased.
spell.lne_wizards.aqua_explosive_bubbles: Spawns explosive Bubbles behind the caster that deal {bubb_damage} damage or heal allies by {bubb_heal} when they explode on contact.
spell.lne_wizards.arcane_precision.descr: On dealing a critical hit with an active spell, apply a stack of Arcane Precision to the target for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.lne_wizards.arcane_precision.name: Arcane Precision
spell.lne_wizards.arcane_starfall.descri: Calls a falling astral star, causing {damage} arcane spell damage. Consumes all Arcane Charges.
spell.lne_wizards.arcane_starfall.name: Falling Star
spell.lne_wizards.fire_flamerush.descrip: Rushes forward and leaves flame clouds on the trail that deals {flamecloud_damage} damage. Also increasing movement speed by {bonus2} and fire spell power by {bonus} for {effect_duration}.
spell.lne_wizards.fire_flamerush.name: Flamerush
spell.lne_wizards.frost_ray.description: Casts a cold beam, causing {damage} damage and slowly freezes the target.
spell.lne_wizards.frost_ray.name: Ray of Frost
spell.lne_wizards.obsidian_shards.descri: On dealing damage with an active spell, shoot obsidian shards outward in all directions from the target.
spell.lne_wizards.obsidian_shards.name: Obsidian Shards
spell.lne_wizards.pyromaniac.description: When dealing spell damage to a burning target, reduce fire spell cooldowns and deal bonus damage.
spell.lne_wizards.pyromaniac.name: Pyromaniac
spell.lne_wizards.rimefrost.description: When dealing damage with an active frost spell, spawn a freezing cloud at the target.
spell.lne_wizards.rimefrost.name: Rimefrost
spell.lne_wizards.terra_rock_crash.descr: Summons a giant rock above the target with a large area impact dealing {damage} damage.
spell.lne_wizards.terra_rock_crash.name: Rock Crash
spell.lne_wizards.water_flow.description: When casting a spell, deal water damage and heal nearby allies in a small area.
spell.lne_wizards.water_flow.name: Water Flow
spell.lne_wizards.wind_aeroburst.descrip: Release an explosive burst of air in all directions, knocking back all nearby enemies with tremendous force and dealing {damage} damage.
spell.lne_wizards.wind_aeroburst.name: Aeroburst
spell.lne_wizards.zephyrs_speed.descript: On dealing damage with an active spell, gain a stack of Zephyr's Speed for {effect_duration} seconds. Increasing spell crit chance by {bonus} and movement speed by {bonus2}.
spell.lne_wizards.zephyrs_speed.name: Zephyr's Speed
